summary: Screening of official/repo sources: notable Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 release, Claude Code making-of, containment engineering, OpenAI coding eval blog, Microsoft agent governance/framework, Mitos sandbox, Codex alpha, among others. Missing user workflow reports and social sources. | Discussion sources highlight agent security risks, eval practices, and memory architectures. Key signals include AI agents triggering endpoint security rules, the 'ratchet' eval pattern, and hierarchical memory for long-horizon tasks. Mainstream product news is sparse; user workflow reports are present but limited.

candidates.why_it_matters: Frontier model for coding and agents, official Anthropic release.
